hero.intro: I design and ship production systems end to end — Angular in the browser, Spring Boot on the server, Docker everywhere in between.

about.title: About me
about.bio1: I'm a full stack developer from Düsseldorf who has spent the last eight years turning ambiguous requirements into systems that survive production. My home turf is the Angular + Spring Boot stack, but I care most about the seams: API contracts, data models, deployments, and the moments where frontend and backend have to agree.
about.bio2: I've worked across fintech, logistics, retail, insurance and healthcare — enough industries to know that clean architecture matters everywhere, and that shipped beats perfect.
about.philosophy1: Boring technology, exciting products. Choose proven tools so the creativity budget goes into the product.
about.philosophy2: Types are documentation that can't lie. From SQL schema to TypeScript interface.
about.philosophy3: Every feature ships with its tests, its metrics and its rollback plan.
achievements: Led the architecture of a payments platform handling 2M+ monthly transactions
Open-source Angular forms library with 1k+ GitHub stars
Speaker at local Java and Angular meetups
